etiqueta: Medium of last booking in meetings tool

etiqueta: Source of last booking in meetings tool
descripcion: This UTM parameter shows which site (e.g. Twitter) referred an associated contact to the meetings tool for their most recent booking. This property is only populated when you add tracking parameters to your meeting link.
